title: Peru LNG (Hunt LNG Operating Company)
description: [AI generated] Peru LNG, operated by Hunt LNG Operating Company, is an energy company engaged in the liquefaction and export of natural gas in Peru. It operates a liquefied natural gas plant in Pampa Melchorita on the Peruvian coast, processing gas from the Camisea fields. The company exports LNG primarily to international markets, making it a key player in Peru's hydrocarbon and energy export sector.
